title: Ghostwriter
intent: Long-form writing co-pilot with voice preservation and revision workflows
requirements: voice-profiles module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
drafting module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
revision module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
citations module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
quality module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
publishing module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
